meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: You have annoyed me for far too long!
quotes.transcript: You have annoyed me for far too long!

quotes.text: Eliminate these intruders or be devoured!
quotes.transcript: Eliminate these intruders or be devoured!

quotes.text: Must I do everything myself?
quotes.transcript: Must I do everything myself?

quotes.text: Go! Show me why I tolerate your incompetence!
quotes.transcript: Go! Show me why I tolerate your incompetence!

quotes.text: Prove your worth, you pathetic lackeys!
quotes.transcript: Prove your worth, you pathetic lackeys!

quotes.text: Minions, do not disappoint me again!
quotes.transcript: Minions, do not disappoint me again!

quotes.text: There will be no end to your suffering.
quotes.transcript: There will be no end to your suffering.

quotes.text: I won't be satisfied until Lothraxian shares your fate!
quotes.transcript: I won't be satisfied until Lothraxian shares your fate!

quotes.text: Yet another battle, I am still wounded from the last one!
quotes.transcript: Yet another battle, I am still wounded from the last one!

quotes.text: All of this, for that red shit Xel-
quotes.transcript: All of this, for that red shit Xel-

quotes.text: Is there no end to you intruders? Do us all a favor and die before I have to kill you myself!
quotes.transcript: Is there no end to you intruders? Do us all a favor and die before I have to kill you myself!

quotes.text: Useless! At least you can fuel my power!
quotes.transcript: Useless! At least you can fuel my power!

quotes.text: The light still burns! Curse that damn Nathrezim!
quotes.transcript: The light still burns! Curse that damn Nathrezim!

quotes.text: What a miserable display! You have all failed in your purpose!
quotes.transcript: What a miserable display! You have all failed in your purpose!

quotes.text: Your death brings me no joy.
quotes.transcript: Your death brings me no joy.

quotes.text: Vow, spawn of the void! Prepare to meet your end!
quotes.transcript: Vow, spawn of the void! Prepare to meet your end!

quotes.text: Take down its pet champion!
quotes.transcript: Take down its pet champion!

quotes.text: We fought together for a thousand years! Do you not trust me?
quotes.transcript: We fought together for a thousand years! Do you not trust me?

quotes.text: Earn your keep! Tell us more!
quotes.transcript: Earn your keep! Tell us more!

quotes.text: I will annihilate you!
quotes.transcript: I will annihilate you!

quotes.text: The light protects you.
quotes.transcript: The light protects you.

quotes.text: I will see this through!
quotes.transcript: I will see this through!

quotes.text: For the Light!
quotes.transcript: For the Light!

quotes.text: Understand, Eurya, that I need this mission, but your aid is welcome.
quotes.transcript: Understand, Eurya, that I need this mission, but your aid is welcome.

quotes.text: His beast is up its place!
quotes.transcript: His beast is up its place!

quotes.text: Belief is our strength. You believe in nothing.
quotes.transcript: Belief is our strength. You believe in nothing.

quotes.text: Hanaru! Dead! Now we're to trust this monstrosity!
quotes.transcript: Hanaru! Dead! Now we're to trust this monstrosity!

quotes.text: You will not stop what the light demands!
quotes.transcript: You will not stop what the light demands!

quotes.text: You will see the lights flash!
quotes.transcript: You will see the lights flash!

quotes.text: The light will cleanse!
quotes.transcript: The light will cleanse!

quotes.text: The light is our greatest weapon against the void. Remember that! We'll succumb to corruption!
quotes.transcript: The light is our greatest weapon against the void. Remember that! We'll succumb to corruption!

quotes.text: You intend to take it prisoner? I would rather incinerate it!
quotes.transcript: You intend to take it prisoner? I would rather incinerate it!

quotes.text: One wrong move, and I will sear you with the right fiend!
quotes.transcript: One wrong move, and I will sear you with the right fiend!

quotes.text: Then we will destroy them, and the ethereals will provide our ordinance.
quotes.transcript: Then we will destroy them, and the ethereals will provide our ordinance.

quotes.text: We need that shield down now!
quotes.transcript: We need that shield down now!

quotes.text: Burn in the light, wretch!
quotes.transcript: Burn in the light, wretch!

quotes.text: You follow this creature to its foul den?
quotes.transcript: You follow this creature to its foul den?

quotes.text: I warned you! This was always their plot!
quotes.transcript: I warned you! This was always their plot!

quotes.text: It corrupts and confounds, makes enemies of friends, twists right into wrong.
quotes.transcript: It corrupts and confounds, makes enemies of friends, twists right into wrong.

quotes.text: And they will!
quotes.transcript: And they will!

quotes.text: You will see!
quotes.transcript: You will see!

quotes.text: You got them all I thought would understand that at all!
quotes.transcript: You got them all I thought would understand that at all!

quotes.text: Your judgement has been clouded by the void, as it always does!
quotes.transcript: Your judgement has been clouded by the void, as it always does!

quotes.text: This is what Alaria wanted to protect you from Arathor. The darkness beyond.
quotes.transcript: This is what Alaria wanted to protect you from Arathor. The darkness beyond.

quotes.text: He is praying us for fools!
quotes.transcript: He is praying us for fools!

quotes.text: You are blind!
quotes.transcript: You are blind!

quotes.text: An endless accursed storm, once and for all!
quotes.transcript: An endless accursed storm, once and for all!

quotes.text: These vile monsters are no match for us, champion!
quotes.transcript: These vile monsters are no match for us, champion!

quotes.text: HANARU LOST TO US!
quotes.transcript: HANARU LOST TO US!

quotes.text: This is taking too long! Stand aside, I'll smash the damn thing!
quotes.transcript: This is taking too long! Stand aside, I'll smash the damn thing!

quotes.text: I will not allow this!
quotes.transcript: I will not allow this!

quotes.text: I became worthy of the light. Self-strength of will is beyond you.
quotes.transcript: I became worthy of the light. Self-strength of will is beyond you.

quotes.text: Ignore it, Arator. See to an area. Salvaging this mission now falls to me.
quotes.transcript: Ignore it, Arator. See to an area. Salvaging this mission now falls to me.

quotes.text: I was reforged in the light. You are blind to the truth.
quotes.transcript: I was reforged in the light. You are blind to the truth.

quotes.text: I'll hunt down Severum. You and this void spawn can handle the trench.
quotes.transcript: I'll hunt down Severum. You and this void spawn can handle the trench.

quotes.text: Yet only I seem to understand what is at stake.
quotes.transcript: Yet only I seem to understand what is at stake.

quotes.text: Soon we'll have all we need. We should strike down this wretch before their hunger turns on us.
quotes.transcript: Soon we'll have all we need. We should strike down this wretch before their hunger turns on us.

quotes.text: Keep your weapons close. Trust nothing to void office.
quotes.transcript: Keep your weapons close. Trust nothing to void office.

quotes.text: Don't look so either beast! You fooled Eurya! But I see through you!
quotes.transcript: Don't look so either beast! You fooled Eurya! But I see through you!

quotes.text: War is no place for a tender hot boy.
quotes.transcript: War is no place for a tender hot boy.

quotes.text: Are you mad, Deliria?
quotes.transcript: Are you mad, Deliria?

quotes.text: I knew you were blind to the void schemes!
quotes.transcript: I knew you were blind to the void schemes!

quotes.text: trusting jesemus was madness!
quotes.transcript: trusting jesemus was madness!

quotes.text: I have served the light for millennia. I understand sacrifice better than you ever could.
quotes.transcript: I have served the light for millennia. I understand sacrifice better than you ever could.

quotes.text: The boys hold your allegiance to none!
quotes.transcript: The boys hold your allegiance to none!

quotes.text: RISK? You trust the word of a dominar over mine?
quotes.transcript: RISK? You trust the word of a dominar over mine?

quotes.text: Acceptable losses. The boy delves knew the risks.
quotes.transcript: Acceptable losses. The boy delves knew the risks.

quotes.text: A creature without purpose, like every fiend from the void!
quotes.transcript: A creature without purpose, like every fiend from the void!

quotes.text: Remember the mission.
quotes.transcript: Remember the mission.

quotes.text: Careful of the void tricks.
quotes.transcript: Careful of the void tricks.

quotes.text: You're shamed that the void has corrupted you too!
quotes.transcript: You're shamed that the void has corrupted you too!

quotes.text: You will realize I was right, Elyria!
quotes.transcript: You will realize I was right, Elyria!

quotes.text: The High Exarch calls us to glory or death!
quotes.transcript: The High Exarch calls us to glory or death!

quotes.text: No! Those worried addicts are not our salvation! The light is the only way to stop Xalatath's evil!
quotes.transcript: No! Those worried addicts are not our salvation! The light is the only way to stop Xalatath's evil!

quotes.text: Control yourselves!
quotes.transcript: Control yourselves!

quotes.text: We must get a lay of the land! Come!
quotes.transcript: We must get a lay of the land! Come!

quotes.text: Then that is our first target. We must weaken the storm and our foes. Move out!
quotes.transcript: Then that is our first target. We must weaken the storm and our foes. Move out!

quotes.text: The time for caution has passed. We will reach their leader and rip the information we need from it.
quotes.transcript: The time for caution has passed. We will reach their leader and rip the information we need from it.

quotes.text: How many betrayals before you seek the truth?
quotes.transcript: How many betrayals before you seek the truth?

quotes.text: You are all blind!
quotes.transcript: You are all blind!

quotes.text: I will tear the Nexus points apart!
quotes.transcript: I will tear the Nexus points apart!

quotes.text: Nowhere left to run for a spa.
quotes.transcript: Nowhere left to run for a spa.

quotes.text: We need nothing from the likes of you!
quotes.transcript: We need nothing from the likes of you!

quotes.text: You would trust such a creature?
quotes.transcript: You would trust such a creature?

quotes.text: Ha! Kill and kill, yet no alarm is raised! They seem used to this chaos!
quotes.transcript: Ha! Kill and kill, yet no alarm is raised! They seem used to this chaos!

quotes.text: The light will always prevail.
quotes.transcript: The light will always prevail.

quotes.text: Then you will tell us how to break the storm, voice-born!
quotes.transcript: Then you will tell us how to break the storm, voice-born!

quotes.text: We embrace a unity you could never understand.
quotes.transcript: We embrace a unity you could never understand.

quotes.text: What does it matter? Salute what we need and then raise this forge to the ground. They can burn with their secrets.
quotes.transcript: What does it matter? Salute what we need and then raise this forge to the ground. They can burn with their secrets.

quotes.text: You are a Paladin, Arator! You must see this jesemus for the monster it is!
quotes.transcript: You are a Paladin, Arator! You must see this jesemus for the monster it is!

quotes.text: Aratul, keep an eye on your mother and her smirk hound. I don't want it out of the light's presence.
quotes.transcript: Aratul, keep an eye on your mother and her smirk hound. I don't want it out of the light's presence.

quotes.text: How could this have gone so wrong? We're no closer to bringing the forces of light to bear on this world!
quotes.transcript: How could this have gone so wrong? We're no closer to bringing the forces of light to bear on this world!

quotes.text: You must be a tool champion, awaiting betrayal. I know what must be done.
quotes.transcript: You must be a tool champion, awaiting betrayal. I know what must be done.

quotes.text: You've been subverting us all along, you're eradicating decimus!
quotes.transcript: You've been subverting us all along, you're eradicating decimus!

quotes.text: They've taken a narrow prisoner! We cannot allow these monsters to possess a being of pure light!
quotes.transcript: They've taken a narrow prisoner! We cannot allow these monsters to possess a being of pure light!

quotes.text: She brought you to heal. How like the endless armies of the void to suffer from disorder.
quotes.transcript: She brought you to heal. How like the endless armies of the void to suffer from disorder.

quotes.text: Keep your distance from the narrow void spawn. You are unworthy to bask in its radiance.
quotes.transcript: Keep your distance from the narrow void spawn. You are unworthy to bask in its radiance.

quotes.text: The launch prevails! I expect decimals put up even less of a fight!
quotes.transcript: The launch prevails! I expect decimals put up even less of a fight!

quotes.text: You follow this creature to its foul den?
quotes.transcript: You follow this creature to its foul den?

quotes.text: Some of us serve greater purposes than hunger, beast!
quotes.transcript: Some of us serve greater purposes than hunger, beast!

quotes.text: Loyalty is so contrary to the void that you betray your master out of boredom!
quotes.transcript: Loyalty is so contrary to the void that you betray your master out of boredom!

quotes.text: Why merely shut down the Nexus points? We should raise them from within!
quotes.transcript: Why merely shut down the Nexus points? We should raise them from within!

quotes.text: Have you learned nothing from Kareish? What did your mentor's trust in the void bring him?
quotes.transcript: Have you learned nothing from Kareish? What did your mentor's trust in the void bring him?

quotes.text: See what the light reveals in your heart!
quotes.transcript: See what the light reveals in your heart!

quotes.text: The light demands your surrender!
quotes.transcript: The light demands your surrender!

quotes.text: You willingly choose to go against the lights will!
quotes.transcript: You willingly choose to go against the lights will!

quotes.text: Why did you turn your back on the light?
quotes.transcript: Why did you turn your back on the light?

quotes.text: You will have no other choice.
quotes.transcript: You will have no other choice.

quotes.text: No! This Elf has made their allegiance known!
quotes.transcript: No! This Elf has made their allegiance known!

quotes.text: Fine. On your head. Be it.
quotes.transcript: Fine. On your head. Be it.

quotes.text: Umbric was not summoned by the Sunwell. The Light knows what it needs to save itself, and it did not call for him.
quotes.transcript: Umbric was not summoned by the Sunwell. The Light knows what it needs to save itself, and it did not call for him.

quotes.text: A destruction?
quotes.transcript: A destruction?
